hero.headline:
Your Family Pool Deserves Family-Level
Care
hero.subheadline: For over 30 years, Putnam Pool Service has kept Fairfield County and Westchester County pools crystal clear. Our certified technicians handle everything so you can stop worrying and just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Inground Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full renovation, our licensed and certified technicians handle every aspect of your inground concrete and gunite pool.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Weekly skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter cleaning to keep your pool swim-ready all season. Consistent care from the same trusted technicians.

cards.title: Pool Repair Services
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and structural issues. Our certified techs restore your pool to peak performance, often in a single visit.

cards.title: Renovation & Restoration
cards.description: Breathe new life into aging pools with updated finishes, tile work, coping, and structural improvements. We specialize in concrete and gunite transformations.

cards.title: Filtration & Pump Systems
cards.description: Installation, maintenance, and repair of filtration and pump systems to ensure crystal-clear water quality and efficient circulation year-round.

cards.title: Heater Installation & Repair
cards.description: Extend your swimming season with professional heater installation, maintenance, and repair. Enjoy comfortable water temperatures from spring through fall.

cards.title: Sanitization Systems
cards.description: Advanced chlorine, salt, and UV sanitization systems installed and serviced by our team. Safe, healthy water for your family without the guesswork.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll inspect your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest recommendation with transparent pricing. No pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Takes Over
steps.description: Our NSPF-certified, fully licensed technicians arrive on schedule. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and repairs — all handled with 30+ years of expertise.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool All Season
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear, safe, and swim-ready. If something ever falls short of your expectations, we come back and make it right. That's the Putnam promise.

about.label: Why Fairfield & Westchester Trust Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1992 — Your Pool Is Personal to Us
about.description: Founded by Jeffery Saunders over 30 years ago, Putnam Swimming Pool Service is a family business built on one simple philosophy: "If the issue is important to you, it is important to us." We specialize in inground concrete and gunite pools across Fairfield County, CT and Westchester County, NY. Every technician on our team is professionally trained, NSPF certified, and fully licensed. We treat your pool like our own because your family's safety and enjoyment is what drives us every day.

features.title: Fully Licensed in CT & NY
features.description: We hold Connecticut Home Improvement, Plumbing, and Pool Builder licenses plus a Westchester County license. Fully insured and compliant in both states.

features.title: 30+ Years of Family Trust
features.description: Three decades of serving the same communities means we've earned our reputation one pool at a time. Many of our clients have been with us for 10, 15, even 20 years.

features.title: Satisfaction Is Our Standard
features.description: BBB A+ rated for a reason. If any service visit doesn't meet your expectations, we come back and make it right at no additional charge.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Straightforward plans for every pool. Adjust or cancel anytime — we earn your trust every visit.

guarantee.headline: The Putnam Pool Promise
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, call us within 24 hours and we'll return to make it right at no extra charge. With a BBB A+ rating and over 30 years of service, our word is our bond. We don't rest until your pool meets our standards — and yours.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. If you have an urgent issue like a green pool or equipment failure, call us directly and we'll do our best to respond within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: Do you only service inground pools?
faqs.answer: We specialize in inground concrete and gunite pools, which is where our 30+ years of expertise really shines. If you have a different pool type, give us a call and we'll let you know if we can help.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians are NSPF certified and APSP members. Putnam Pool Service holds multiple Connecticut and New York state licenses including Home Improvement, Plumbing, and Pool Builder credentials.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in both Connecticut and New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. We're fully licensed in both states and serve Lower Fairfield County, CT — including Greenwich, Stamford, Darien, New Canaan, Norwalk, and Westport — as well as Westchester County, NY.

faqs.question: What sets Putnam apart from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We're a family-owned business that has been serving this community since 1992. Our BBB A+ rating, professional certifications, and decades of loyal clients speak to the quality and consistency of our work. We treat every pool like it's our own.

testimonials.name: Karen K.
testimonials.text: Very dependable, responsive, professional pool service company! Happy and will continue to use! Highly recommend!

testimonials.name: Mitchell R.
testimonials.text: Great service!! A very knowledgeable full service pool company. We had a water quality issue and they resolved it quickly.

testimonials.name: Brad H.
testimonials.text: I have been using Putnam Pool for many years, and they do a great job. Reliable, professional, and always on schedule.

contact.subtitle: Get a free pool evaluation from a family-owned team with 30+ years of experience. No contracts, no pressure — just honest service from people who care.
benefits: Free pool evaluation with every quote
